summary: Tested Championships/Competitions module enhancements: competition team creation, match creation with home_team/opponent, Excel/CSV import with multilingual headers (PT, ES, FR, IT, EN), match sorting by date+time, result update, match_time field, and translation keys. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with screenshots.

create_competition_team.description: POST /api/championships/{id}/teams - Creates competition team without errors

create_competition_team_with_pavilion.description: Competition team with pavilion_name and pavilion_address

duplicate_team_name_validation.description: Duplicate team names are rejected with 400 error

create_match_success.description: POST /api/championships/{id}/matches - Creates match with opponent_team, match_time, matchday

create_match_with_home_team.description: External match with explicit home_team and opponent_team (is_club_match=false)

update_match_result.description: PUT /api/championships/matches/{id}/result - Updates scores and marks is_completed=true

import_matches_csv_portuguese.description: Import CSV with PT headers: Equipa Casa, Adversário, Data, Hora, Local, Jornada

import_matches_csv_spanish.description: Import CSV with ES headers: Equipo Local, Rival, Fecha, Hora, Lugar, Jornada

import_matches_csv_french.description: Import CSV with FR headers: Équipe Domicile, Adversaire, Date, Heure, Lieu, Journée

import_matches_csv_italian.description: Import CSV with IT headers: Squadra Casa, Avversario, Data, Ora, Luogo, Giornata

import_matches_csv_english.description: Import CSV with EN headers: Home Team, Opponent, Date, Time, Venue, Round

match_time_field.description: match_time field is saved and returned in match data

championships_data_structure.description: Championship endpoint returns proper data structure

championships_list_page.description: Shows competitions with Ver Detalhes and Eliminar buttons

championship_detail_page.description: Shows matches grouped by Jornada (round), sorted by date and time

add_match_dialog.description: Has opponent input, date input, matchday input, location select

import_matches_dialog.description: Has file input for Excel/CSV import

teams_tab.description: Shows competition teams with Adicionar Equipa and Importar Excel buttons

add_team_dialog.description: Has team name, pavilion name, pavilion address, kit colors fields

match_display.description: Matches show date, time, home team vs opponent, location badge, result

home_team_first.description: Home team displayed first in match card (e.g., 'HC SINTRA vs UD VILAFRANQUENSE')

critical_code_review_comments: CompetitionTeamCreate model correctly has no required championship_id in body (passed via URL path)
Import matches endpoint supports 5 languages for all column headers
match_time field properly saved and returned in match data
matchesByRound sorting in frontend correctly sorts by date AND time
Home team displayed first in match card as expected
seed_data_creation: Test competition teams and matches created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Championships/Competitions module fully tested. Competition team creation works without errors. Match creation with home_team and opponent works. Import matches from Excel/CSV supports 5 languages (PT, ES, FR, IT, EN). Match sorting by date+time works. Result update with score validation works. match_time field saved and displayed. Translation keys present in all 5 languages. All 16 pytest tests pass.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - Resend email requires user API key
